---
title: "Edward Hugh Moberly"
---

## Edward Hugh Moberly

**Dates:** (b.1850)

### Description

fifth son of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly, Vicar of Chute

### Biography

He married (1897) Laura Florence Winn, and described himself as ‘retired clergyman’ in the 1901 census.

### Letters

- Letter from [March 1871[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from October [1855]
- Letter from June 1855.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
